title: Trump Signs Executive Order Directing Pentagon to Release UAP/Alien Files
detail: President Trump signs an executive order directing the Department of Defense to begin the process of releasing classified UAP and alien-related files to the public. The order mandates a 90-day review of all classified UAP programs and establishes a timeline for public disclosure. Trump states 'the American people deserve to know what their government knows about these phenomena.' The executive order is the first presidential directive specifically targeting UAP disclosure and is praised by advocates as the most significant government action on UAP transparency to date. The order faces immediate implementation challenges from defense and intelligence agencies citing national security concerns.

media.caption: Trump Orders Pentagon to Release UFO Files
